explain: a hard substance that comes from the ground and is used for building and carving
a machine that prints books, magazines, newspapers, etc., usually in large numbers
to create or produce (something useful) for the first time
a sudden or major change in action and thought
to carry something or someone from one place to another
having many details that make it difficult to understand
the use of science in industry, engineering, etc., to invent useful things or to solve problems
an object that is sent into space to travel around the Earth
statement: The old stone house survived the earthquake.
The original printing press was hand operated.
The automobile caused a revolution in our way of traveling.
Trucks are used for transporting oil.
Recent advances in medical technology have saved countless lives.
The space shuttle orbited a communications satellite.
We have greatly advanced in our knowledge of the world.
Please come whenever it is convenient for you.
